name: Classic Bran Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1 Preheat the oven to 375°F.
2 Mix together wheat bran and buttermilk; let stand for a few minutes.
3 Combine vegetable oil, egg, sugar, and vanilla extract in a separate bowl. Add this mixture to the buttermilk-bran mixture.
4 Sift together flour, baking soda, baking powder, and salt. Stir into the first mixture until just combined.
5 Fold in raisins or dates and spoon batter into prepared muffin tins.
6 Bake for 15-20 minutes.
